qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which stadium entities with name equal to 'Invesco Field at Mile High' and home games equal to '8', having at least one related game record (linked on stadium.id = game.stadium_id) with away team equal to 'Pakhtakor'?

qa_pairs.question: Which stadiums have at most 8 home games, a capacity percentage exactly 96.0, and have hosted games where the score is 0–0?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.home_games <= 8 AND stadium.capacity_percentage = 96.0 AND game.score = '0–0'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which stadium entities with home games at most '8' and capacity percentage equal to '96.0', having at least one related game record (linked on stadium.id = game.stadium_id) with score equal to '0–0'?

qa_pairs.question: Which stadiums had a game on 16 August 2008, an average attendance of exactly 74908.0, and at most 8 home games?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE game.date = '16 August 2008' AND stadium.average_attendance = 74908.0 AND stadium.home_games <= 8
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which stadium entities with average attendance equal to '74908.0' and home games at most '8', having at least one related game record (linked on stadium.id = game.stadium_id) with date equal to '16 August 2008'?
